title: Vodafone and AST SpaceMobile Partnership for European Satellite Services
text: Vodafone and AST SpaceMobile established a jointly-owned European satellite service business called SatCo to deliver space-based cellular broadband to mobile network operators across Europe. The partnership aims to provide comprehensive geographic coverage throughout Europe. SatCo will function as an exclusive distributor of AST SpaceMobile's satellite services under a turnkey arrangement, operating a European network operations center and ground stations providing backhaul services to the satellite network in low Earth orbit. AST SpaceMobile's satellites operate as remote radio heads while maintaining core network capability with mobile operators. The solution operates directly with standard smartphones without requiring specialized software or device modifications. The initiative emphasizes digital sovereignty, with European headquarters and management under Vodafone's co-ownership. A research hub is launching in Málaga by summer 2025, developed with the University of Málaga and Spanish Space Agency. AST SpaceMobile is expanding its Barcelona presence with new manufacturing and office facilities totaling 5,600 square meters to support European production and testing operations.
